# The Stronger Life

> Christian premarital counseling, marriage coaching, and wedding officiant services helping couples grow stronger together — personally and relationally. Based in St. Cloud, Minnesota; serving Central Minnesota, the Twin Cities metro, and couples nationwide via virtual sessions.

The Stronger Life is led by **Matt Reeve**, a licensed premarital counselor, Prepare/Enrich certified facilitator, certified relationship coach, and ordained minister with 32+ years of experience. The practice focuses on strengthening marriages before they begin and supporting couples at every stage — not just getting couples to the wedding, but helping them build a foundation for a lasting marriage.

**First consultation:** Free 30-minute meeting, no pressure or obligation (in person or virtual).

**Service area:** St. Cloud and Central Minnesota, Twin Cities metro (wedding officiant); premarital counseling and marriage coaching available virtually nationwide.

## Services

- [Premarital Counseling](https://thestrongerlifemn.org/premarital-counseling): Prepare/Enrich-based program with 5–6 personalized sessions (1.5–2 hours each). Builds communication, conflict resolution, and relationship strengths. Eligible for discounted Minnesota marriage license. $600 standalone; $400 when bundled with wedding officiant services.
- [Wedding Officiant](https://thestrongerlifemn.org/wedding-officiant): Personalized Christian wedding ceremonies in St. Cloud and Central Minnesota. Custom ($750), Personalized ($600), and Simple & Intimate ($500) packages. Full-service support from planning through ceremony and legal filing.
- [Marriage Coaching](https://thestrongerlifemn.org/marriage-coaching): Ongoing relationship coaching for couples at any stage — in person (St. Cloud area) or virtual nationwide. Single sessions ($150), 4-session package ($525), or comprehensive program ($600).

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://thestrongerlifemn.org/): Overview of services, testimonials, FAQs, and booking CTAs.
- [Services & Pricing](https://thestrongerlifemn.org/services): Transparent pricing for all three core services.
- [About Matt Reeve](https://thestrongerlifemn.org/about): Background, approach, credentials, and 32+ years of experience.
- [Book a Free Consultation](https://thestrongerlifemn.org/contact): Contact form and direct contact details.
- [Testimonials](https://thestrongerlifemn.org/testimonials): 26+ five-star reviews from couples; photo gallery from ceremonies.
- [Blog](https://thestrongerlifemn.org/blog): Articles on communication, conflict resolution, wedding planning, and building a thriving marriage (content managed via Sanity CMS).
